column9: Description of Event
A flamboyance of ‘Flailmingos’ have escaped across the plains of Otherworld. Find a Flailmingo, complete the task and return them to safety to earn your Flailmingo Wrangler badge.

column8: Inner Child Post Box Re-Birth through the birth canal
column9: Inner Child Post Box Re-Birth through the birth canal: Arrive at Reframing and transform as you enter the secret door, travel back through the birth canal and re- birth yourself through the vulva and into the Inner Child Post Box then write your inner child a post card. (Open 9am-2am - come by anytime)
The Reframing Art Project invites you to revisit your younger self, star gaze & offer healing word hugs to your inner little one (Open 9am-2am - come by anytime)
Supplies provided. Work on own project or join Knitters vs Crocheters in longest scarf comp!
Look for our squad to “secure your titties”. With consent of course.

Recruiting conspiracy game players who know narrative from counter-narrative. Drain the swamp, rehydrate the bog. Moisture isn’t real. Cryptopreneurs Radically Included <sad emoji>. Wanna play a game? Then, find Improvocateurs with checkered sashes.

column8: Soft Tacos: but make it Hard
column9: The Avocado is friendly but Chipotle smells your fear. Is the Salsa twerking to Darude? The Cheese fell asleep in the sun again. Oh well, it’s a pre-party Picnic. Your mission is to make the taco of your dreams; if you can find it…
Pick a stranger, jump in the ball pit, pick up a ball & read the question, discover the answers to life, the universe and everything. And make a friend :)
A quiet, self- guided threshold space for reflection and learning. Explore Hecate, sacred symbolism, and the roots of temples as places of art and devotion. Enter freely, stay as long as you like.
Community canvas space with paints and materials provided. Start a piece or build on another’s work. Includes a display of past creations and community art from previous years.

Looking to connect with some new people? Play the Snack Squad game! Grab a food flag, look for others who are wearing a food flag, make a snack squad of foods. Return to Garden of Eatin with your Squad for a prize

Nevermore shepperds Bazaar lounge.: Nevermore Shepherds Lounge is a wandering ritual space of tea, coffee, puppets, and story. A living lounge where strangers become presences—invited to slow down, connect, and co-create through play, symbols, and shared moments.
Packed in a hurry? String lights became sentient? Jewelry fused into nautical knots? Visit the Sloplandia Detanglery and receive emergency field surgery from a highly unlicensed professional.

We saw some Disney Princes and Princesses experiencing their first Otherworld! If you find them, stop to say hello, sing a song, dance, get your face painted, become a royal, play a game, or take a portrait! Help them learn about OW! ALL AGES!
Come and get some temporary ink! We have designs for all ages, so come get a Nerdy picture or Naughty saying.
Healing space offering intuitive touch, massage, tarot, and guidance. A calm place to ground, connect, and be supported. Drop in as you feel called.
Meet Cat Lenny: cosmic traveller, dimensional beast, certified good boy. Climb aboard and transcend this earthly plane. Capture photographic evidence as you ride eternally through space and time.
Tiny men. Massive stakes. All chirps. No spins!

column6: Everywhere I am is where the hugs will be. Look for the signs.
column9: Healing Hugs that come with a prescription for a refill.

See a guy in tie dye caddy coveralls? Congratulations, you’ve found wandering bucket golf. Attempt athletic greatness with deeply inadequate equipment in the least prestigious tournament in modern history.
Your neighbourhood lemonade bar & lounge, serving up fabulously moist libations (boozy + non).

Immerse yourself in a uterine universe. Embibe amniotic pink drinks, strap on your umbilical cord, rejuvenate. Choose your rebirth style off our menu and be reborn via our glorious vagina slide! And so much more!
The one and only Low Bar pours open daily from 12–4. Spin the wheel, grab a drink, and enjoy the antics of our legendary bartenders.

Thought- provoking questions, daily Oral Administration: form-filling excitement with paper & pencils. Results will be read aloud for the enjoyment of anyone who wishes to Indulge, and catalogued online with previous years’ questions & answers.

The Fafffway Village is a collection of camps providing service and entertainment to Otherworldians:Confession Concession, Indulge Your Census, Department Of Responsible Flailing (DORF), Pickle Fountain, Banana Ambassadors
Moist Nitro Yerba Mate: Come fill your MUGS with some moist offerings of Nitro Yerba Mate

The place to go to help you express yourself & decommodify by fixin yer shit. We’ve got a bunch of tools (sewing, grommets, rivets, glues, tapes, + more!) and supplies to help you repair your OW finery (or just come hang out and make!)
Mahjong Lounge Open: Pull up a chair, shuffle the tiles, sip tea, and meet strangers who may become camp friends. Beginners welcome; lucky legends tolerated.
Come and enjoy the music of the 1980s greatest pop star Samantha Fox. Samantha Fox trivia with prizes.

oin us for some accounta-buddying/body doubling and chill crafting/making time at Fix-it, while we finish our own set-up. Avail yourself of our tools and supplies and company. Make a dent in, or even finish, your project/ UFO!

Come Hither all ye children and inner children to the Inner Child Post Box to find the box of old treasures. There’s one for everyone but leave the rest for your mates. Yarrr. (Open 9am-2am - come by anytime)

Bring your best bartering items to the Casino, test your mind, body and spirit against the house, winner takes all! No item? No problem, tasks can build credit at the Casino. Come on by and try your luck!

Gabriel (7 years exp) leads a fun shibari rope workshop. Focusing on connection, safety and consent, learn how to use the humble single column tie for spicy bedroom play. Solo or partnered, everyone is welcome! Bring rope or borrow ours (19+)
Come by and use our metal stamps to make yourself a small metal tag (similar to a dog tag). Materials provided for first 50 people; first come first serve. Child friendly with adult assistance.
Looking to bring a spark to your bedroom? A casual introduction to electrical play. Safety, equipment, and the do’s and don’ts. 19+

Broke a strap, lost a button, ripped yer pants? Get help with mending, repairing, altering or fixing clothes/gear at the Moistly Helpful Help Desk from an experienced seamstress/crafter with an abundance of supplies.
Show up early. Get slapped. Do it hot.

An interactive herbal installation for self-guided plant meditation. Herbal inctures with plant cards and QR codes invite visitors to choose, taste, and tune inward to learn from each plant through reflection, writing, or drawing, shared or kept.
(Ongoing Offering) Have you ever had a dream that really stuck with you? Bring it to the Occult Library and we’ll help you make meaning of it using Jung’s framework of dream interpretation.

Swing by to make a custom 1.25” pronoun button! We’ll have ze/zer, xe/xim, she/her, he/him, + they/them pre- printed pronouns (+ paper to make your own!). Add to a unique or shiny background, + voila! A pronoun pin as unique as you! Materials supplied
We open the psychedelic nightclub! + D3VIANT Dance Party
Is your name Jeff?ery Geoff? Jefferson? Meet all your namesakes and become reborn as Jeff.

Inner Child Post Box: Saunter out of the Reframing Art Project filled with inspiration and carry forward to your inner child, a message from the future. We will mail your postcard to you in 9 months’ time (Open 9am- 2am - come by anytime)

Immerse yourself in our iridescent glow in the dark forest where you play different size of mini golf holes (giant, medium, miniature), a wishing well, a plink- hole and a Confession-hole (a full size confessional where you can confess your sins get absolution)

Deflower us! ...by accessorizing yourself with fabulous clip-on flowers and other faux floral creations at our 24-hour self-service boutique. Dewiness not guaranteed. Floral fashion consultants available spore-adically.
Come make merry with some faries and sample our magical liquides! Alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks available
Grab a drink and watch our fighters clash! Cheer on your favourites while you lounge.

hey nerdlinger! opening of the NERD INK temporary tattoo station- nothign compliments a pocket protector better than a hastily applied lower back tattoo. available all weekend, but come early for best choice of designs and help with application

We’re flipping the sign to “Open” at 6:00 PM. Come help us kick off the weekend with 90s video games and movies on the big screen. It’s the perfect time to scope out the lounge, find the board games, and get your first rounds of the weekend in.

column8: Ironic Spin’s Big Kick Off Extravanganza
column9: You know you want to start it off right at the 25-foot Boombox. It IS Right. It Does.

Step into Babylon—where sensual movement meets slow-burning desire. Ground into your body, awaken your hips and chest, and melt into hypnotic rhythms. Come to be seen, felt, and explored—no experience needed, only willingness (19+)
ClASSic AssASSin game...Badger Style! All are welcome! Please arrive promptly at 7pm to get your targets and sign up as all entrants will need to be there at the start to register!
Come solo or with friends. Learn Fusion basics, meet new people, and discover how different dance styles connect on the floor.
The event of the season, come strut your stuff or spectate to celebrate the opening of Burning Glam!
The second annual Sapphic mixer! Bring your crafts in progress and get ready to enjoy some iced tea, chill pud vibes, and flirty sapphic cuties!
12 Step All Recovery Meeting

How does the rave sustain you? Collage a square of our collective zine ‘quilt’ exploring the myriad ways raving touches our lives! We will display the installation, then turn it into a zine and porta- potty decorations for future gatherings.
Step on up to Salon Saloon’s Opening Night! It’s newbie night! We promise no hair will be left behind during our Junior Stylist training. Get fresh, stay fresh.

column9: Cary, our paino player, will play the best of Queen and Elton John.
Join us for tales of The Hungry Caterpillar, Bradley Magog and more! Puppets included.
Follow the glowing 發 tile into sunset grooves
Oscillation Location!
A kinky play space for all your adventuring needs. DM on duty. Lots of equipment available. Openning time flexible on request.
Roving Coat Check, the most convenient, most mobile coatcheck to service Otherworld, circa 2023. You might lose use, but we won’t lose your coat!™
A glowing little hippy trap of light, sound, and color. Come get caught, mellow out, and stay awhile. Open ~10pm until the power runs out.
The Legend of Poncho Villa: Join Joe for some margaritas and his drunk rendition of the world’s most interesting Mexican revolutionary. (Mar garitas available until they’re gone)
Come here at night to paint with light!
Join us in our Tantric Tavern for a SOP Sapphic- themed night. Space is only for people identifying as women.
Stop by and embody a human noodle in our UMAMI-themed plounge. Commune with the Celestial Ramen Bowl to reveal your ramen fortune. Sundown to sunup all weekend. No ramen, unless you’re lucky.
An all-gender ceremony to thank the masculine and welcome in the feminine.

column8: Star Citizen Flight Experience with Chaos Gremlins
column9: Star Citizen flight demonstrations (live in-game) with the Chaos Gremlins. Watch fast fighters move through space and planets across the ‘verse. ~8–9pm Thurs/Fri/Sat.

Help! We’re lost! But at least we aren’t cold and lost…because we have hot chocolate! If you can find us, we’ll share it with you! Follow your penguiny senses (or your nose) to our little travelling hot chocolate cart and we’ll warm you up too!
Check out Cosmic after dark for a highly interactive, out of this world experience!

column8: Queer SciFi Book Club & Stargazing. Solarpunk Film Nightcap
column9: Re-vision shared futures with the camp that’s coaxing society back from the brink. Bring your favourite book or recommendation to swap. Stick around past bedtime to share night sky stories. Movie after 11.
Join us in our Tantric Tavern to explore your nauti side! Consent monitors on shift.

Together we explore the wonders of the yoni by embracing and embodying the playful curiosity of the maiden. *Please note: This event is open to everyone with a vulva, regardless of gender. This gathering is not open to people with a penis. 19+
Space to connect with the sacred feminine- in-all-creation. *Please note: The lounge is open to all women (cis & trans), non-binary & gender fluid folks. Men (cis & trans) are welcome on Sunday.
Submit to the universe and let our flavours takeover! Play stupid games to determine your snack fate!

column9: Will you get a hiss or a purr? Your public access fever dream for alley cats, art goblins, camp legends, and the terminally curious.
Camp Squirrel: Camp Squirrel: Assume the position at our hole and let us put our balls in your mouth! We may even call you a good girl. Random ball offerings Fri-Sun.

Dim Sum, Drinks and DJs!: Step into Cathartic Cantina for our soul- feeding camp experience with small bites for your belly and big releases for your soul. All served with spicy tunes, cool drinks and interactive art.

column9: Dim Sum Party with Drinks and DJs: Step into the Cathartic Cantina for our soul-feeding experience with small bites and big release of the soul. Served with spicy tunes, cool drinks and interactive art.

Warm Yr Bones: Bone broth in the Graveyard
Midnight Soup @ Ironic Spin: The Ironic Spinletts will be serving up some steaming hot soup to go along with some steaming hot trax.

SUBMISSIONS WANTED: PIG-TURE Exhibition!: Tired of doom scrolling? Escape the algorithm & add to our PIG-TURE exhibition! Snap a pic during the festival of the theme MOIST, print it at our camp & pin it on the board. Come back to see who has liked or commented! What a dopamine rush!

Smile and Wubz: A seismic 100K‑watt love letter to Island Wubz, penned by an epic 4-DJ lineup and delivered on the biggest sound system on site. We drop you in below 28 Hz, you do your best bass face. A night of bass, community, and keeping the wubby spark alive.

Herbal Reflections: An interactive herbal installation for self-guided plant meditation. Herbal inctures with plant cards and QR codes invite visitors to choose, taste, and tune inward to learn from each plant through reflection, writing, or drawing, shared or kept.
Spectral Projection: An interactive television set where the viewer not only creates video art, but is the art.
Bleeding gums check: Is there a food that makes your mouth bleed but it’s just so delicious that you keep eating it? Are you maybe allergic to walnuts, Becky? Then come and do the check.
Supplies provided. Work on own project or join Knitters vs Crocheters in longest scarf comp!
80’s Ski Lodge Time Machine: Hear the synth echo across timelines - in a space where neon reigns.
Reframing Art Project: The Reframing Art Project invites you to revisit your younger self, star gaze & offer healing word hugs to your inner little one (Open 9am-2am - come by anytime)

Board Speed Dating: Study your board and learn what makes it like it is. Do you like them Alder? Do you Pine? What makes it Teak? Part game show, part bonding over slivers, part participatory participation.
The 14th Anniversary Party: Bohemian style tea and cookies oasis is celebrating its 14th anniversary on Friday! Join us for a dance, cocktail (while quantaties last) or tea and homemade cookies.
Our cardboard train will chug around Otherworld emitting the energy of no stress and passing out fruit to those who will receive.

column8: Keep those peepers on your face, in fashion.
column9: Keep those peepers on your face, in fashion.: Make sunglass chains in front of our giant pair of glasses! Clean your glasses, shake your asses!

column8: Pregnant and new parent village connector
column9: Pregnant and new parent village connector: Circle & village connector for pregnant/new moms/parents to share and support each other through the arts and music weekend. A space to build community, exchange resources and stories, with an oracle card offering for grounding and reflection.

Glizzy Gala: Start pressing your jorts for solid food and SHOT DOGS to fill every void. Lose your dignity at the Casino of Many Things, peruse D*Arts. Admission free for raccoons in trench coats. Is that soup?
Acrobatic burlesque
Climb the dicks, find the clit - if you can. Touch it just right and the whole thing lights up! Burner hours- if lights are on, come climb! (19+ or with supervision to climb the wall, please)
Come celebrate your very merry unbirthday with a flat white and a cookie
Pick a stranger, jump in the ball pit, pick up a ball & read the question, discover the answers to life, the universe and everything. And make a friend :)
A brief instructor- led exercise routine that has been practiced in Japan for nearly 100 years. It literally lasts for three minutes so don’t be late! Disclaimer: you’ll barely be damp at the end.
Sip a little, sparkle a lot! An unapologetically pink coffee experience, just for you <3
Come and get some temporary ink! We have designs for all ages, so come get a Nerdy picture or Naughty saying.
We love the smell of oatmeal— err... GRUEL in the morning!
Be crowned king/queen *ad tempus*, have your portrait drawn, and enact new laws in the kingdom! (Subject to beheading, dethroning, or uprising by other means)
Our most cherished and beloved vessel hath been lost! Become a Knight Who Says Ni and hunt for our most Holy Chalice!
What is a queer camp without fibre arts? Bring your knitting, crochet, cross stitch, embroidery project and your coffee/ tea and wake up slowly with your fellow queers.

column8: The Free Bookstore is Open! with Kid’s Area
column9: All genres of books to browse and take home, cozy nature crafting corner, shaded kids play area, self serve herbal tea, kids dressups and DIY facepainting.

column6: Fairytale BookHub Café & Trash Fence Kid’s Play Area
column9: Waking up is better with a hot D. Hole! Come by for fresh made deep fried donut holes coated with cinnamon & sugar. Please enjoy our shady Café, & kiddos Trash Fence play area.

Perfumery & Aromatherapy: Mix together your own custom olfactory palette from our collection of essential oils and aromatics then make a roll-on bottle of your unique creation to take with you and slather on later!
DIY Face/ Body Paint/ Tattoos. Kids! Come decorate yourself, your parent, your friend or sibling. Adults, come be a kid again!
Fluoropong table tennis lessons: Come learn to play table tennis
Naked Pancakes!: Served 10-12 or until we put clothes on
1-on-1 healing sessions, including massage, reiki, sound healing, breathwork, and other modalities.
Artsy Fartsy Time: Good morning, brother! Come art with us - we supply the paints, you paint the things. Hell yeah, brother? Hell yeah.

Compost Camp: FEED WORMS MOISTLY: Find “COMPOST” buckets near the toilets. Take one to your camp and return it at camp’s end. If it’s full, swap for a fresh one or share with a neighbour. We collect buckets from toilets only.
Placenta Pancakes Breakfast: Come fuel up for the day with some delicious Placenta Pancakes in the Living Womb. Get rebirthed before noon and rock your day renewed!
IT Help: Are IT problems derailing your plans? Our on site nerds might be able to help with your phone, laptop, speaker or other IT type issues at the Moistly Helpful Help Desk.

Grounding Yoga: Join Emily for a grounding & uplifting morning yoga practice. Connect deeply to your inner waters and the loving embrace of mother earth. *Please note: This event is open to all women (cis & trans), non-binary & gender fluid folks.
Find your flow yoga: A 60-minute yoga practice to connect with yourself and move in community. All levels are welcome.
Learn to travel to your own inner sacred space by yourself and take the map home with you. Open the circle and create an intention
Vipassana Meditation: A one-hour Vipassana sit to arrive, breathe, and observe. A quiet landing into the Sensuary through stillness and awareness.
Sensory Dispensary: Wanna lick a stone? See a tune? Touch the unexpected? Explore a living collection of sensations inside the Sensuary.

The Daily Drop-In: Each day, devote some time to intentionally connect with your soma through movement, your breath, touch and sound. Return to the present moment, inhabit your body and senses and just be with whatever is alive for you.

Crafty Breakfast Club: Start the day with a hearty breakfast and a good cranking of your units. Tuck in dangly bits, strengthen bonds, and crank those nuts - we’ve got a wobbly road ahead! We’ll have pancakes, coffee, cranks, bits, and lace - bring your units! Oh, and Jam.

column6: In the (soft,warm) Belly of the Beast
column8: In the (soft,warm) Belly of the Beast
column9: In the (soft,warm) Belly of the Beast: There is so much to explore at Otherworld, but sometimes you need a break - a moment of rest, to wait for something to call to you. Shelter in the (soft, warm) belly of the beast, swaddled, protected, and take a long breath.

Cinder-Fellas and the Playa Princesses: We saw some Disney Princes and Princesses experiencing their first Otherworld! If you find them, stop to say hello, sing a song, dance, get your face painted, become a royal, play a game, or take a portrait! Help them learn about OW! ALL AGES!

Yoga-lates with KHold: Shake your boobs and berries (Camp puns fully intended 🍓). Miss your workout? This yoga + Pilates fusion has you covered. Flow, sculpt, sweat, then melt into a Yin cooldown. Led by K-Hold, with optional hands-on assists.
Bloom & Bowl Ritual: Ease into the day with singing bowl vibrations and warm Moroccan tea

column8: Intro to Rope with Danger Mouse!
column9: Come learn safety and foundational ties like a single column tie and basic chest harness, variants for diverse bodies. No previous experience needed. Some rope available, or bring your own. Bring a buddy, meet a buddy, or tie yourself in knots!

column8: Rub-a-Dub-Dub A Song and a Scrub
column9: Rub-a-Dub-Dub A Song and a Scrub: Shower Line Up Karaoke and Entertainment

Philosopher’s Café: What is the nature of board?: Intellectuals, come discuss the ethics and epistemology of boardness, but please leave your metaphysics at home. Metaphysics was rightfully supplanted by science (natural science).

See a guy in tie dye caddy coveralls? Congratulations, you’ve found wandering bucket golf. Attempt athletic greatness with deeply inadequate equipment in the least prestigious tournament in modern history.
Visit our DIY tack shop and craft up a beaded/tassled bandana or shop the free boutique to rustle up some new duds!
Get Nailed and Stamped: Nail painting glory hole & temporary tatoos

Silk Fans workshop: Discover the art of silk fan flow ✨This beginner- friendly workshop teaches graceful movements, smooth transitions, & simple choreography using silk fans. Some silk fans are provided (or bring your own). Come flow with us

column8: Festival Friending: Speed Connecting & Conscious Convos
column9: Meet inspiring humans through fun, thought-provoking connection exercises and small-group discussions. We blend music, movement and meaningful conversation to help you make new friends and deepen bonds. Minimal cringe & maximum fun!
Bling Your Bean/Carhartt Stamping: Bring your carabiner and come bling out your bean. Or swing by with an article of clothing for a dykey linocut stamp.

Signs of the Revolution!: Signs, signs, everywhere a sign! Join us in spreading joy, humour, and compassion by painting a SIGN for your camp and/or the Otherworld community at large. All materials provided. All ages welcome!

column8: To flip or not to flip
column9: Tumbling basics!
Juggling, rings, balls and clubs! All welcome!

column8: Wet Felting at Garden of Eatin
column9: Come learn how to turn wool into art using only the magic of friction and water!!
Drop in for a quick game of Deathtrap D&D in an Otherworldian Dungeon

Guided yoga & breath to enter into center, open to free flowing nectar of Love below & above. Give your day a key to open into the holy hallelujah within your sensuous heart (+ a lil line dancin’!) Let’s get that high from the inside. Yeehaw!

Pillage your plate with golden planks of Norse toast, with fruit and syrupy plunder “Skål!” But beware, a sneaky Viking may get you with a moist ambush mid-feast! There will be goblets of golden bubbles to raise and guzzle like a berserker!
Oscillation Station!
Brain full? Nervous system buzzing? Turn down the mind and enter the Sensuary through breath and sensation.
Meet Cat Lenny: cosmic traveller, dimensional beast, certified good boy. Climb aboard and transcend this earthly plane. Capture photographic evidence as you ride eternally through space and time.
I am the great Cornholio. I need beanbags for my bunghole.
classic emo tunes and eyeliner

Bring anything BUT a ‘traditional’ instrument - and let’s jam
A projected light space walk.
Join us in the Tantric Tavern for an RMT- guided couples massage. Take turns learning to relax and connect with your partner through touch.

The Slushy Cats Chill Lounge - with a new flavor of slushy each day. come relax with us. art installations, luxury furniture, flower gardens, tanning beds, tables, misting fans with shade. Costumes & and array of lighting wizardry at night.
Feast your eyes upon the Unearthly Spectacle and immerse yourself in the Collective Effervescence* of Interdimensional Wonder! *Collective Effervescence not guaranteed

Sound, Mind, Body with Dawn & Craig: A unique yoga & sound experience; a visceral journey through sound, movement & stillness. Flow, into Yin, ending with Yoga Nidra techniques & a deep Savasana, while Craig mixes electronic music, natural sounds, delta waves, & binaural beats live.

Crossing The Threshold: A gentle threshold ritual to begin the festival. Through presence practices and light inner exploration, we’ll release what we’re carrying, set intentions, and open to what wants to emerge. Come as you are.

Ever wanted to forage but scared of poisoning yourself? Or just want to know your plants better? Come explore the local flora on the trails and learn identification tricks and safe, ethical, legal foraging
Come get in shape and sweaty for the fun workout group class. Bring a water bottle and your best fitness outfit and let’s get stronger together
Spin a wheel. Earn a mimosa. Win a prize!? Praise Gary.
Professionally led boredom. Please do not meditate nor be mindful.
(Probably) guided crafting workshop! Make a shield to defend yourself from adversaries, or a totally authentic (or paper) stained glass art piece to adorn your humble abode.
Grand opening of Disco Loco. Come celebrate our grand opening with a group shotgun. Byob & Byob opener

Come get an undershave or your current one touched up. Or come by to dyke up your look with a new mullet or a rat tail. We don’t guarantee quality, but we do guarantee no one will think you’re straight after you see us.
Come take part in our dyke scavenger hunt from Friday until Sunday at 12pm. Scavenger hunt cards due back at 12pm on Sunday. There may even be a prize.
Come learn how to create a 100% compostable resin alternative

Come chill in our Plounge Twinkle Tent, coze up with a quirky book, pull an oracle card, cuddle a squishmallow and prepare to have your senses gently delighted. Roving Moth Dance. Temporary Tattoo/ Adornment Station. Yoga Nidra Tent. Chill vibes.

Hold on to your all-inclusive-cruise-package and plunge overboard into another icy dimension with the Magical Mystery Cruise as we set sail for the (Ant) arctic. Lifeguards on duty 12:00 - 5:00pm daily.

Immerse yourself in a uterine universe. Embibe amniotic pink drinks, strap on your umbilical cord, rejuvenate. Choose your rebirth style off our menu and be reborn via our glorious vagina slide! And so much more!

column9: SMART Recovery meeting at Recovery House. Sobriety skills in triggering environments.
Come and play Monopoly and discuss consolidating generational wealth. BYO stale, dusty Nilla wafers

column6: Sky Hummingbird Curios & Com- pliments Bar
column9: Serving up drinks and kind words, while you peruse the shop of curious wonders. Plinko pays your bill!
Get elbows deep and fist around at our S-L- U-T friendship anal bead bracelet making station.
Daily raising of our perverted flags to honour the sluts. Come pay your respects. Featuring our rage box - a designated place to write and store your rage.
Love boobs? Come flap some fun bags around with our delightful boobie themed cornhole game!
Come take a look at our big and beautiful foot, but be careful, no free foot pics! Make sure to bring an offering to Big Dawg if you want to capture it.
Come revere the slut within and leave a slutty confession

Plug into a journey of enlightenment as we present Alan Watts’ iconic lectures, digitally restored and faithfully presented on our powerhouse audio system, woven seamlessly with inspirational ambient music.

SoBar at The Cottage is your booze‑free oasis, serving artisanal mocktails and craft 0.0 brews from noon to late afternoon and nightly from 9 PM. No alcohol, no hangovers—just pure refreshment, bright vibes, and maximum memories all Otherworld long.
The one and only Low Bar pours open daily from 12–4. Spin the wheel, grab a drink, and enjoy the antics of our legendary bartenders.
Come have a delicious cup of Turkish Coffee and recieve a divinatory reading with your cup. Please arrive on time, this will be a closed container with a limit of 10 participants.

Connect More Deeply with Self & Other: Arrive on time and step in. We slow down to let what’s real emerge. Using grounded Authentic Relating practices, we will awaken curiosity, presence, empathy and sparkly human magic in this heart-centered workshop. Facilitated by Sheri Hauser
Origami crafts

Astrology is awesome. All the cool kids know. Come nerd out with us as we gaze upon the heavens above to find out what’s happening below. There’s a lot to make sense of in these crazy times. History doesn’t repeat itself but it sure does rhyme.

Come twist, tangle, and wire-wrap like you mean it. Wire wizards and newbies welcome - tips available! Dig thru our shiny hoard, or bring your own trinket, crystal, or fave weird object. Tools & wire provided, questionable technique encouraged.

An improvisational dance and embodiment workshop focused on self-expression, presence, and connection. With guided exercises, you’ll become more physically & relationally expressive — less about how it looks, more about what it feels like to be you!

column8: Dancin’ Dan will facilitate at Under The Mother Tree Main Space
column9: Expressive Embodiment Shake Down!: Step out of the mind and into the body. Through playful movement, improvisational games, and connection with self and others, awaken creativity, presence, and authentic expression. Leave feeling alive, grounded, free, and connected.

column8: Garden Grove at The Cottage (Sublime Sunday)
column9: Dub stylee! A hazy, dub‑kissed hour drifting through sun‑baked riffs and stoner‑surf sway, carrying that unmistakable Garden Grove spirit. Warm guitars, lazy‑day grooves, and chill that feels like coasting down the boulevard with nowhere to be.

Step into Tom’s domain of soft‑toy transformation, where teddy bears receive over‑the‑top enhancements powered by enthusiasm, improvisation, and zero regard for manufacturer intent. Fluff everywhere, laughter guaranteed, and Tom in his element.

column8: Are your dreams feeling dry and parched?
column9: Are your dreams feeling dry and parched? Looking for some dreamspiration? Wet your dreams in the Dreamidifier®, a playful session to remember what matters most. The rinse cycle begins promptly, don’t miss the mist!
Adrian & Nikki Dance Workshop
Run out of snacks? Got a snag in your party pants? A little last- day coddling, Campocalypse style. Exotic canned goods encouraged.
A revolutionary arts & crafts workshop feat. DIY screenprinting, button-making, stencils and graffiti art. Make art for the resistance and enjoy the Molotov cocktail bar!

Step right up and enjoy the circus! Snacks, wonders, games and more. Bring your wildest animal to tame. Puuurfect for young wonders and ringleaders.

column8: PNP? The fun and wonderful world of chemsex

ongoing offering: Have you ever had a dream that really stuck with you? Bring it to the Occult Library and we’ll help you make meaning of it using Jung’s framework of dream interpretation.
Open Mic

At Touch Temple Camp downstairs (hand flags & red/gold circus tent), pull up a seat at this Café serving a menu of poetry, humor, bad advice, coaching, and consensual touch, all served with empathy and fun.
